name: phase-5
description: Phase 5 exploration — temporary implementation audit. Use when the user asks for phase 5, test-run implementation, contract validation, or checking whether Phase 2-4 captured every required change before real implementation.
paths:
  - "objects/**/*.odin"
  - "game/**/*.odin"
  - "ui/**/*.odin"

  - "game_mode/**/*.odin"
  - "logger/**/*.odin"
---

# Phase 5: Exploratory Implementation Audit
* Do not remove TODOs
* Do not add any new functions or types
* Do not edit outside of TODOs
* You MUST implement the FULL feature
* build and test should pass
* and run the JSON game and validate that you see the results.
* once you have validated everything that works you must make the following understandings.
* If this is NOT possible then you must report to the user the missing TODOs / structs / functions that made this impossible
* review odin.md for style guides
* If you are missing JSON data to validate the feature then report that to the user.

## Phase 5 done criteria

- [ ] Exploratory implementation attempted the complete scoped feature flow, not just a partial compile path.
- [ ] Every uncaptured needed change is classified as Phase 2, 3, or 4.
- [ ] Every known in-scope crash, missing behavior, and unresolved TODO is classified before Phase 6.
- [ ] Difficult or awkward contracts are reported for user discussion.
- [ ] All exploratory code, wiring, instrumentation, and tests are reverted.
- [ ] The working tree contains no exploratory implementation edits.
- [ ] Update Linear issue to **Phase 5** before Phase 5 work starts.
- [ ] Phase 5 commit pushed and **PR created or updated immediately** if any kept docs/report changed.
- [ ] Summary asks whether the user wants optional Phase 6 assertions before Phase 7.
